creator: kbyanc@posi.net
text:
On Wed, 29 Sep 1999, Chris Piazza wrote:

> Hi,
> 
> The program was recently updated (ver 1.2.3 now).  If you can
> update this patch to work with that I'll commit it.
> 
> -Chris
> -- 
> :Chris Piazza          :             Abbotsford, BC:
> :cpiazza@home.net      :        cpiazza@FreeBSD.org: 
> :                      :                           :
> 

  Thanks, the port is attached. As a side note, the new version
(considerably larger change than the minor version bump would have
indicated) requires mmencode to be installed. Currently, mmencode can only
be installed as part of the metamail port/package. Metamail in turn
requires X, so all of a sudden bgrab (a curses app) requires X to be
installed. In any event, the fix I found was to simply make a separate
port of mmencode. bgrab depends on the mmencode port (which I just
submitted 5 minutes ago).

  Kelly
 ~kbyanc@posi.net~
